---
title: "T1D Adiposity scRNA NEBULA Results Report"
author: "Ye Ji Choi"
format:
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: true
    scrollable: true
    transition: slide
    controls-layout: bottom-right
    menu: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    fontsize: 15
    number-sections: true
---

```{r include = F}
library(jsonlite)
library(aws.s3)
library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
library(kableExtra)
library(tidyverse)
library(fgsea)
```

```{r include = F}
user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (user == "choiyej") {
  results_dir <- "/Users/choiyej/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UW/Bjornstad/T1D Adiposity"
  keys <- fromJSON("/Users/choiyej/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofColoradoDenver/Bjornstad Pyle Lab/keys.json")
  git_path <- "/Users/choiyej/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
} else if (user == "yejichoi") {
  results_dir <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/yejichoi/T1D_Adiposity"
  keys <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/yejichoi/keys.json")
} else if (user == "pylell") {
  results_dir <- "/Users/pylell/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UW/Bjornstad/T1D Adiposity"
  keys <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/pylell/keys.json")
} else {
  stop("Unknown user: please specify paths.")
}
```

```{r include = F}
Sys.setenv(
  "AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID" = keys$MY_ACCESS_KEY,
  "AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY" = keys$MY_SECRET_KEY,
  "AWS_DEFAULT_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_S3_ENDPOINT" = "s3.kopah.uw.edu"
)
```

```{r echo = F}
# Cell type groups matching the KPMP cell types used in the analysis
celltype_groups <- list(
  PT = c("PT-S1/S2", "PT-S3", "aPT"),
  `PT-S1/S2` = "PT-S1/S2",
  `PT-S3` = "PT-S3",
  aPT = "aPT",
  TAL = c("C-TAL-1", "C-TAL-2", "aTAL", "dTAL"),
  `C-TAL-1` = "C-TAL-1",
  `C-TAL-2` = "C-TAL-2",
  aTAL = "aTAL",
  dTAL = "dTAL",
  PC = c("CCD-PC", "CNT-PC", "dCCD-PC", "M-PC", "tPC-IC"),
  `CCD-PC` = "CCD-PC",
  `CNT-PC` = "CNT-PC",
  `dCCD-PC` = "dCCD-PC",
  `M-PC` = "M-PC",
  `tPC-IC` = "tPC-IC",
  IC = c("IC-A", "IC-B", "aIC"),
  `IC-A` = "IC-A",
  `IC-B` = "IC-B",
  aIC = "aIC",
  DTL_ATL = c("DTL", "aDTL", "ATL"),
  DTL = "DTL",
  aDTL = "aDTL",
  ATL = "ATL",
  DCT_CNT = c("DCT", "dDCT", "CNT"),
  DCT = "DCT",
  dDCT = "dDCT",
  CNT = "CNT",
  EC = c("EC-AVR", "EC-GC", "EC-PTC", "EC-AEA", "EC-LYM", "EC/VSMC", "EC-A"),
  `EC-AVR` = "EC-AVR",
  `EC-GC` = "EC-GC",
  `EC-PTC` = "EC-PTC",
  `EC-AEA` = "EC-AEA",
  `EC-LYM` = "EC-LYM",
  `EC/VSMC` = "EC/VSMC",
  `EC-A` = "EC-A",
  Immune_Myeloid = c("MAC", "MON", "cDC", "pDC"),
  MAC = "MAC",
  MON = "MON",
  cDC = "cDC",
  pDC = "pDC",
  Immune_Lymphoid = c("CD4+ T", "CD8+ T", "B", "NK", "cycT"),
  `CD4+ T` = "CD4+ T",
  `CD8+ T` = "CD8+ T",
  B = "B",
  NK = "NK",
  cycT = "cycT",
  VSMC_P_FIB = c("VSMC/P", "FIB"),
  `VSMC/P` = "VSMC/P",
  FIB = "FIB",
  POD = "POD",
  MC = "MC",
  PEC = "PEC",
  Schwann = "SchwannCells",
  Other = "non-specific"
)

kpmp_general <- c(
  "PT", "TAL", "PC", "IC", "EC", "Immune")
```

```{r echo = F}
# Folder mapping: display name -> analysis_type (matching run_nebula_single.R config names)
folders <- c(
  # --- Categorical: BMI within T1D (unadjusted) ---
  "T1D Normal vs Overweight (BMI)" = "T1D_normal_vs_overweight_bmi",
  "T1D Non-obese vs Obese (BMI)" = "T1D_nonobese_vs_obese_bmi",
  "T1D Normal vs Obese (BMI)" = "T1D_normal_vs_obese_bmi",
  "T1D Normal vs OW+Obese (BMI)" = "T1D_normal_vs_ow_obese_bmi",
  # --- Categorical: DXA within T1D (unadjusted) ---
  "T1D Normal vs Overweight (DXA)" = "T1D_normal_vs_overweight_dxa",
  "T1D Non-obese vs Obese (DXA)" = "T1D_nonobese_vs_obese_dxa",
  "T1D Normal vs Obese (DXA)" = "T1D_normal_vs_obese_dxa",
  "T1D Normal vs OW+Obese (DXA)" = "T1D_normal_vs_ow_obese_dxa",
  # --- Categorical: HC vs T1D (BMI, unadjusted) ---
  "HC vs T1D Normal (BMI)" = "HC_vs_T1D_normal_bmi",
  "HC vs T1D Overweight (BMI)" = "HC_vs_T1D_overweight_bmi",
  "HC vs T1D Obese (BMI)" = "HC_vs_T1D_obese_bmi",
  # --- Categorical: HC vs T1D (DXA, unadjusted) ---
  "HC vs T1D Normal (DXA)" = "HC_vs_T1D_normal_dxa",
  "HC vs T1D Overweight (DXA)" = "HC_vs_T1D_overweight_dxa",
  "HC vs T1D Obese (DXA)" = "HC_vs_T1D_obese_dxa",
  # --- Categorical: BMI within T1D (adjusted for age) ---
  "T1D Normal vs Overweight (BMI, adj age)" = "T1D_normal_vs_overweight_bmi_adj_age",
  "T1D Non-obese vs Obese (BMI, adj age)" = "T1D_nonobese_vs_obese_bmi_adj_age",
  "T1D Normal vs Obese (BMI, adj age)" = "T1D_normal_vs_obese_bmi_adj_age",
  "T1D Normal vs OW+Obese (BMI, adj age)" = "T1D_normal_vs_ow_obese_bmi_adj_age",
  # --- Categorical: DXA within T1D (adjusted for age) ---
  "T1D Normal vs Overweight (DXA, adj age)" = "T1D_normal_vs_overweight_dxa_adj_age",
  "T1D Non-obese vs Obese (DXA, adj age)" = "T1D_nonobese_vs_obese_dxa_adj_age",
  "T1D Normal vs Obese (DXA, adj age)" = "T1D_normal_vs_obese_dxa_adj_age",
  "T1D Normal vs OW+Obese (DXA, adj age)" = "T1D_normal_vs_ow_obese_dxa_adj_age",
  # --- Categorical: HC vs T1D (BMI, adjusted for age) ---
  "HC vs T1D Normal (BMI, adj age)" = "HC_vs_T1D_normal_bmi_adj_age",
  "HC vs T1D Overweight (BMI, adj age)" = "HC_vs_T1D_overweight_bmi_adj_age",
  "HC vs T1D Obese (BMI, adj age)" = "HC_vs_T1D_obese_bmi_adj_age",
  # --- Categorical: HC vs T1D (DXA, adjusted for age) ---
  "HC vs T1D Normal (DXA, adj age)" = "HC_vs_T1D_normal_dxa_adj_age",
  "HC vs T1D Overweight (DXA, adj age)" = "HC_vs_T1D_overweight_dxa_adj_age",
  "HC vs T1D Obese (DXA, adj age)" = "HC_vs_T1D_obese_dxa_adj_age",
  # --- Continuous: T1D only (unadjusted) ---
  "BMI (T1D)" = "cont_bmi_t1d",
  "DXA Body Fat (T1D)" = "cont_dexa_body_fat_t1d",
  "DXA Bone Mineral Density (T1D)" = "cont_dexa_bone_mineral_density_t1d",
  "DXA Fat kg (T1D)" = "cont_dexa_fat_kg_t1d",
  "DXA Lean Mass (T1D)" = "cont_dexa_lean_mass_t1d",
  "DXA Lean kg (T1D)" = "cont_dexa_lean_kg_t1d",
  "DXA A/G Ratio (T1D)" = "cont_dexa_ag_ratio_t1d",
  "DXA Est. VAT (T1D)" = "cont_dexa_est_vat_t1d",
  "DXA Trunk kg (T1D)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_kg_t1d",
  "DXA Trunk Mass (T1D)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_mass_t1d",
  # --- Continuous: All subjects (unadjusted) ---
  "BMI (All)" = "cont_bmi_all",
  "DXA Body Fat (All)" = "cont_dexa_body_fat_all",
  "DXA Bone Mineral Density (All)" = "cont_dexa_bone_mineral_density_all",
  "DXA Fat kg (All)" = "cont_dexa_fat_kg_all",
  "DXA Lean Mass (All)" = "cont_dexa_lean_mass_all",
  "DXA Lean kg (All)" = "cont_dexa_lean_kg_all",
  "DXA A/G Ratio (All)" = "cont_dexa_ag_ratio_all",
  "DXA Est. VAT (All)" = "cont_dexa_est_vat_all",
  "DXA Trunk kg (All)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_kg_all",
  "DXA Trunk Mass (All)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_mass_all",
  # --- Continuous: All subjects (adjusted for group) ---
  "BMI (All, adj group)" = "cont_bmi_all_adj_group",
  "DXA Body Fat (All, adj group)" = "cont_dexa_body_fat_all_adj_group",
  "DXA Bone Mineral Density (All, adj group)" = "cont_dexa_bone_mineral_density_all_adj_group",
  "DXA Fat kg (All, adj group)" = "cont_dexa_fat_kg_all_adj_group",
  "DXA Lean Mass (All, adj group)" = "cont_dexa_lean_mass_all_adj_group",
  "DXA Lean kg (All, adj group)" = "cont_dexa_lean_kg_all_adj_group",
  "DXA A/G Ratio (All, adj group)" = "cont_dexa_ag_ratio_all_adj_group",
  "DXA Est. VAT (All, adj group)" = "cont_dexa_est_vat_all_adj_group",
  "DXA Trunk kg (All, adj group)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_kg_all_adj_group",
  "DXA Trunk Mass (All, adj group)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_mass_all_adj_group",
  # --- Continuous: T1D only (adjusted for age) ---
  "BMI (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_bmi_t1d_adj_age",
  "DXA Body Fat (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_body_fat_t1d_adj_age",
  "DXA Bone Mineral Density (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_bone_mineral_density_t1d_adj_age",
  "DXA Fat kg (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_fat_kg_t1d_adj_age",
  "DXA Lean Mass (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_lean_mass_t1d_adj_age",
  "DXA Lean kg (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_lean_kg_t1d_adj_age",
  "DXA A/G Ratio (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_ag_ratio_t1d_adj_age",
  "DXA Est. VAT (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_est_vat_t1d_adj_age",
  "DXA Trunk kg (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_kg_t1d_adj_age",
  "DXA Trunk Mass (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_mass_t1d_adj_age",
  # --- Continuous: All subjects (adjusted for age) ---
  "BMI (All, adj age)" = "cont_bmi_all_adj_age",
  "DXA Body Fat (All, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_body_fat_all_adj_age",
  "DXA Bone Mineral Density (All, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_bone_mineral_density_all_adj_age",
  "DXA Fat kg (All, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_fat_kg_all_adj_age",
  "DXA Lean Mass (All, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_lean_mass_all_adj_age",
  "DXA Lean kg (All, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_lean_kg_all_adj_age",
  "DXA A/G Ratio (All, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_ag_ratio_all_adj_age",
  "DXA Est. VAT (All, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_est_vat_all_adj_age",
  "DXA Trunk kg (All, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_kg_all_adj_age",
  "DXA Trunk Mass (All, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_mass_all_adj_age",
  # --- Continuous: All subjects (adjusted for group + age) ---
  "BMI (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_bmi_all_adj_group_age",
  "DXA Body Fat (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_dexa_body_fat_all_adj_group_age",
  "DXA Bone Mineral Density (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_dexa_bone_mineral_density_all_adj_group_age",
  "DXA Fat kg (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_dexa_fat_kg_all_adj_group_age",
  "DXA Lean Mass (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_dexa_lean_mass_all_adj_group_age",
  "DXA Lean kg (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_dexa_lean_kg_all_adj_group_age",
  "DXA A/G Ratio (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_dexa_ag_ratio_all_adj_group_age",
  "DXA Est. VAT (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_dexa_est_vat_all_adj_group_age",
  "DXA Trunk kg (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_kg_all_adj_group_age",
  "DXA Trunk Mass (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_mass_all_adj_group_age",
  # --- Interaction: continuous * group ---
  "BMI x Group" = "interaction_bmi",
  "DXA Body Fat x Group" = "interaction_dexa_body_fat",
  "DXA Bone Mineral Density x Group" = "interaction_dexa_bone_mineral_density",
  "DXA Fat kg x Group" = "interaction_dexa_fat_kg",
  "DXA Lean Mass x Group" = "interaction_dexa_lean_mass",
  "DXA Lean kg x Group" = "interaction_dexa_lean_kg",
  "DXA A/G Ratio x Group" = "interaction_dexa_ag_ratio",
  "DXA Est. VAT x Group" = "interaction_dexa_est_vat",
  "DXA Trunk kg x Group" = "interaction_dexa_trunk_kg",
  "DXA Trunk Mass x Group" = "interaction_dexa_trunk_mass"
)

reverse_folders <- setNames(names(folders), folders)

meta_df_compiled <- tryCatch({
  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".csv")
  save_object(object = "results/nebula/csv/run_metadata_compiled.csv",
              bucket = "t1d.adiposity", region = "", file = tmp)
  df <- read.csv(tmp, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  unlink(tmp)
  df
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Could not load compiled metadata: ", e$message)
  data.frame()
})
```

# Helpers
```{r}
# =============================================================================
# VOLCANO PLOT FUNCTION
# =============================================================================
make_volcano <- function(data, p_col, fc, title = NULL,
                         test_name,
                         sig_type = "pval", fdr_col = NULL,
                         p_thresh = 0.05,
                         cell_type = "",
                         formula_text = NULL,
                         cohort_text = NULL,
                         positive_text = "Positive",
                         negative_text = "Negative",
                         text_size = 20,
                         geom_text_size = 4,
                         caption_size = 8.5,
                         legend_text_size = 10,
                         volcano_force = 6,
                         volcano_box_padding = 0,
                         off_chart_threshold = 0.95,
                         off_chart_y_position = 0.85,
                         off_chart_arrow_length = 0.02) {
  
  if (!p_col %in% names(data) || !fc %in% names(data)) return(NULL)
  
  data <- data %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[p_col]]) & !is.na(.data[[fc]]))
  if (nrow(data) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  # Apply significance filter based on sig_type
  if (sig_type == "fdr") {
    if (is.null(fdr_col) || !fdr_col %in% names(data)) return(NULL)
    data <- data %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[fdr_col]]))
    data$is_sig <- data[[fdr_col]] < p_thresh
  } else {
    data$is_sig <- data[[p_col]] < p_thresh
  }
  
  set.seed(1)
  epsilon <- 1e-300
  
  # For FDR plots, use adjusted p-values on the y-axis; otherwise use raw p-values
  y_col <- if (sig_type == "fdr") fdr_col else p_col
  data <- data %>%
    dplyr::mutate(neg_log_p = -log10(.data[[y_col]] + epsilon))
  
  y_max <- max(data$neg_log_p, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.1
  y_cutoff <- y_max * off_chart_threshold
  
  top_pos <- data %>%
    dplyr::filter(.data[[fc]] > 0 & is_sig) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(.data[[y_col]])
  n_pos <- nrow(top_pos)
  top_pos_n <- top_pos %>% dplyr::slice_head(n = 20)
  
  top_neg <- data %>%
    dplyr::filter(.data[[fc]] < 0 & is_sig) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(.data[[y_col]])
  n_neg <- nrow(top_neg)
  top_neg_n <- top_neg %>% dplyr::slice_head(n = 20)
  
  # Identify off-chart genes
  off_chart_genes <- data %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% c(top_pos_n$Gene, top_neg_n$Gene) & neg_log_p > y_cutoff) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      is_positive = .data[[fc]] > 0,
      x_position = ifelse(is_positive,
                          .data[[fc]] + seq(from = 0.1, by = 0.2, length.out = n()),
                          .data[[fc]] - seq(from = 0.1, by = 0.2, length.out = n())),
      y_position = y_max * off_chart_y_position
    )
  
  on_chart_genes <- c(top_pos_n$Gene, top_neg_n$Gene)[!c(top_pos_n$Gene, top_neg_n$Gene) %in% off_chart_genes$Gene]
  
  data <- data %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      top_color = case_when(
        Gene %in% top_pos$Gene ~ "#f28482",
        Gene %in% top_neg$Gene ~ "#457b9d",
        TRUE ~ "#ced4da"
      ),
      top_size = if_else(Gene %in% c(top_pos$Gene, top_neg$Gene), 1.3, 1),
      top_lab  = if_else(Gene %in% on_chart_genes, Gene, ""),
      display_neg_log_p = pmin(neg_log_p, y_cutoff)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(abs(.data[[fc]]) < 10)
  
  max_fc <- max(data[[fc]], na.rm = TRUE)
  min_fc <- min(data[[fc]], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # Build caption
  has_formula <- !is.null(formula_text) && !is.na(formula_text)
  has_cohort  <- !is.null(cohort_text) && !is.na(cohort_text)
  
  caption_text <- paste0(
    if (has_formula && has_cohort) {
      paste0("Formula: ", formula_text, " + (1|subject) | Cohort: ", cohort_text, "\n\n")
    } else if (has_formula) {
      paste0("Formula: ", formula_text, " + (1|subject)\n\n")
    } else if (has_cohort) {
      paste0("Cohort: ", cohort_text, "\n\n")
    } else { "" },
    "\nCell type: ", cell_type,
    if (cell_type != "") " | " else "",
    "Positive n = ", n_pos, " | Negative n = ", n_neg,
    if (nrow(off_chart_genes) > 0) paste0("\n", nrow(off_chart_genes), " gene(s) with p-values near zero (arrows indicate off-scale values)") else ""
  )
  
  # Y-axis label
  y_label <- ifelse(sig_type == "fdr", "-log10(adj. p-value)", "-log10(p-value)")
  
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[fc]], y = display_neg_log_p)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_thresh), linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgrey") +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5, aes(color = top_color), size = 3) +
    geom_label_repel(seed = 1,
                     data = dplyr::filter(data, top_lab != ""),
                     aes(label = top_lab, color = top_color),
                     fontface = "bold",
                     size = geom_text_size, max.overlaps = Inf,
                     force = volcano_force, segment.alpha = 0.3, segment.size = 0.3,
                     box.padding = volcano_box_padding,
                     fill = fill_alpha("white", 0.7),
                     label.size = 0
    )
  
  # Add arrows for off-chart genes
  if (nrow(off_chart_genes) > 0) {
    p <- p +
      geom_segment(
        data = off_chart_genes,
        aes(x = .data[[fc]], y = y_cutoff * 0.98,
            xend = .data[[fc]], yend = y_cutoff - (y_max * off_chart_arrow_length)),
        arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.15, "cm"), type = "closed"),
        color = "black", size = 0.6
      ) +
      geom_text(
        data = off_chart_genes,
        aes(x = x_position, y = y_position, label = Gene),
        size = geom_text_size * 0.9,
        hjust = ifelse(off_chart_genes$is_positive, 0, 1),
        color = "black", fontface = "italic"
      ) +
      geom_text(
        data = off_chart_genes,
        aes(x = x_position, y = y_position - (y_max * 0.03),
            label = paste0("p=", format(.data[[y_col]], scientific = TRUE, digits = 2))),
        size = geom_text_size * 0.7,
        hjust = ifelse(off_chart_genes$is_positive, 0, 1),
        color = "darkgrey"
      )
  }
  
  p <- p +
    labs(title = title,
         x = paste0("log2 FC ", test_name),
         y = y_label,
         caption = caption_text) +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(1, 1.3)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#457b9d" = "#457b9d", "#ced4da" = "#ced4da", "#f28482" = "#f28482")) +
    guides(color = "none", size = "none") +
    annotate("segment",
             x = max_fc / 8, xend = (max_fc * 7) / 8,
             y = -y_max * 0.13,
             col = "darkgrey", arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm"))) +
    annotate("text",
             x = mean(c(max_fc / 8, (max_fc * 7) / 8)),
             y = -y_max * 0.18,
             label = positive_text,
             size = geom_text_size, color = "#343a40") +
    annotate("segment",
             x = min_fc / 8, xend = (min_fc * 7) / 8,
             y = -y_max * 0.13,
             col = "darkgrey", arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm"))) +
    annotate("text",
             x = mean(c(min_fc / 8, (min_fc * 7) / 8)),
             y = -y_max * 0.18,
             label = negative_text,
             size = geom_text_size, color = "#343a40") +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, y_max), clip = "off") +
    theme(legend.title = element_blank(),
          panel.grid = element_blank(),
          text = element_text(size = text_size),
          title = element_text(size = legend_text_size),
          plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 20, b = 25, l = 20),
          axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 32)),
          plot.caption = element_text(size = caption_size, hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(t = 15)),
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
          plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
          legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
          legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA))
  
  return(p)
}
```

# T1D adiposity state

## BMI
```{r}
transparent_theme <- theme(
  plot.background      = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
  panel.background     = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
  legend.background    = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
  legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
  legend.key           = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA)
)

# =============================================================================
# Helper: run the full pipeline (scatters, bars, GSEA, CSVs) for one
# adiposity definition. Definition must be one of "bmi", "dxa", "whtr".
# =============================================================================
run_contrast_analysis <- function(definition,
                                  kpmp_general,
                                  root_path,
                                  pathways,
                                  transparent_theme) {

  stopifnot(definition %in% c("bmi", "dxa", "whtr"))

  # File suffix and path for each contrast (per analysis_config in run_nebula_single.R)
  hc_subdir   <- sprintf("HC_vs_T1D_normal_%s", definition)
  hc_suffix   <- sprintf("hc_t1d_norm_%s",     definition)
  obow_subdir <- sprintf("T1D_normal_vs_ow_obese_%s", definition)
  obow_suffix <- sprintf("t1d_norm_owob_%s",   definition)

  # Dynamic column names for the within-T1D OW+OB binary contrast
  obow_logfc_col <- sprintf("logFC_%s_ow_obese_binaryOverweight_Obese", definition)
  obow_se_col    <- sprintf("se_%s_ow_obese_binaryOverweight_Obese",    definition)
  obow_pval_col  <- sprintf("p_%s_ow_obese_binaryOverweight_Obese",     definition)

  # Output directories (one per figure type, organized by definition)
  fig_base <- file.path(root_path, "T1D Adiposity/Results/Figures/Contrasts", definition)
  csv_base <- file.path(root_path, "T1D Adiposity/Results/Compiled results/Contrasts", definition)
  for (sub in c("scatter", "bar", "specific", "nebula", "gsea")) {
    out_dir <- if (sub %in% c("nebula", "gsea")) file.path(csv_base, sub) else file.path(fig_base, sub)
    dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  }

  for (cell in kpmp_general) {
    cat(sprintf("[%s] %s ...\n", definition, cell))

    # ---- Load HC vs T1D-Normal results ----
    ct_hc_vs_t1d_normal <- s3readRDS(
      object = sprintf("results/nebula/%s/%s/%s_nebula_%s_processed.rds",
                       hc_subdir, cell, cell, hc_suffix),
      bucket = "t1d.adiposity", region = ""
    ) %>%
      select(Gene,
             logFC.diab = `logFC_groupType 1 Diabetes`,
             se.diab    = `se_groupType 1 Diabetes`,
             pval.diab  = `p_groupType 1 Diabetes`,
             fdr.diab   = fdr) %>%
      distinct(Gene, .keep_all = TRUE)

    # ---- Load T1D OW+OB vs T1D-Normal results ----
    ct_t1d_ow_obese_vs_t1d_normal <- s3readRDS(
      object = sprintf("results/nebula/%s/%s/%s_nebula_%s_processed.rds",
                       obow_subdir, cell, cell, obow_suffix),
      bucket = "t1d.adiposity", region = ""
    ) %>%
      select(Gene,
             logFC.obese = !!sym(obow_logfc_col),
             se.obese    = !!sym(obow_se_col),
             pval.obese  = !!sym(obow_pval_col),
             fdr.obese   = fdr) %>%
      distinct(Gene, .keep_all = TRUE)

    cell_safe <- gsub("/", "_", cell)

    # ---- Combine and classify ----
    ct_combined <- merge(ct_hc_vs_t1d_normal, ct_t1d_ow_obese_vs_t1d_normal) %>%
      mutate(
        sig.obese = case_when(pval.obese < 0.05 & logFC.obese > 0 ~ "up",
                              pval.obese < 0.05 & logFC.obese < 0 ~ "down",
                              TRUE ~ "ns"),
        sig.diab  = case_when(pval.diab  < 0.05 & logFC.diab  > 0 ~ "up",
                              pval.diab  < 0.05 & logFC.diab  < 0 ~ "down",
                              TRUE ~ "ns"),
        sig.joint = paste(sig.obese, sig.diab, sep = "_"),
        sig.joint_clean = case_when(
          sig.joint %in% c("up_up", "down_down") ~ "Amplified",
          sig.joint %in% c("up_down", "down_up") ~ "Reversed",
          sig.joint %in% c("down_ns", "up_ns")   ~ "Adiposity-specific",
          sig.joint %in% c("ns_down", "ns_up")   ~ "T1D-specific",
          TRUE ~ "NS"
        )
      )
    ct_combined$sig.joint_clean <- factor(
      ct_combined$sig.joint_clean,
      c("Amplified", "Reversed", "Adiposity-specific", "T1D-specific", "NS")
    )

    ct_sig            <- ct_combined %>% filter(sig.joint_clean %in% c("Amplified", "Reversed"))
    ct_sig_concordant <- ct_combined %>% filter(sig.joint_clean %in% c("Adiposity-specific", "T1D-specific"))

    # ---- logFC scatter ----
    ct_combined %>%
      filter(sig.joint_clean == "NS") %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = logFC.diab, y = logFC.obese, color = sig.joint_clean)) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.1, size = 1) +
      geom_point(data = ct_sig_concordant, alpha = 0.3, size = 2) +
      geom_point(data = ct_sig, alpha = 0.8, size = 3) +
      geom_label_repel(data = ct_sig, aes(label = Gene), max.overlaps = Inf) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("Amplified" = "#f08080",
                                    "Reversed" = "#90be6d",
                                    "Adiposity-specific" = "#669bbc",
                                    "T1D-specific" = "#ffcb77",
                                    "NS" = "#e5e5e5")) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
            panel.grid = element_blank(),
            plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")) +
      labs(x = "logFC\nT1D NW vs. HC",
           y = "logFC\nT1D OB+OW vs. T1D NW",
           color = NULL,
           title = cell_safe) +
      transparent_theme
    ggsave(file.path(fig_base, "scatter",
                     sprintf("%s_scatterplot_t1d_obow.png", cell_safe)),
           width = 7, height = 7, bg = "transparent")

    # ---- Bar plot ----
    ct_combined %>%
      filter(sig.joint_clean != "NS") %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = sig.joint_clean, fill = sig.joint_clean)) +
      geom_bar() +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("Amplified" = "#f08080",
                                   "Reversed" = "#90be6d",
                                   "Adiposity-specific" = "#669bbc",
                                   "T1D-specific" = "#ffcb77",
                                   "NS" = "#e5e5e5")) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
            panel.grid = element_blank(),
            plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
            legend.position = "none",
            axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1)) +
      labs(x = NULL, y = "Count") +
      transparent_theme
    ggsave(file.path(fig_base, "bar",
                     sprintf("%s_bar_t1d_obow.png", cell_safe)),
           width = 5, height = 7, bg = "transparent")

    # ---- GSEA ----
    ranks.diab  <- with(ct_hc_vs_t1d_normal, logFC.diab / se.diab)
    names(ranks.diab) <- ct_hc_vs_t1d_normal$Gene
    ranks.diab  <- sort(ranks.diab[is.finite(ranks.diab)], decreasing = TRUE)

    ranks.obese <- with(ct_t1d_ow_obese_vs_t1d_normal, logFC.obese / se.obese)
    names(ranks.obese) <- ct_t1d_ow_obese_vs_t1d_normal$Gene
    ranks.obese <- sort(ranks.obese[is.finite(ranks.obese)], decreasing = TRUE)

    fg.diab  <- fgseaMultilevel(pathways = pathways, stats = ranks.diab,
                                minSize = 10, maxSize = 500, nPermSimple = 10000)
    fg.obese <- fgseaMultilevel(pathways = pathways, stats = ranks.obese,
                                minSize = 10, maxSize = 500, nPermSimple = 10000)

    fg <- inner_join(
      fg.diab  %>% select(pathway, NES.diab  = NES, padj.diab  = padj, leA = leadingEdge),
      fg.obese %>% select(pathway, NES.obese = NES, padj.obese = padj, leB = leadingEdge),
      by = "pathway"
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        sig.diab  = padj.diab  < 0.05,
        sig.obese = padj.obese < 0.05,
        quadrant = case_when(
          sig.diab & sig.obese & NES.diab > 0 & NES.obese > 0 ~ "Amplified",
          sig.diab & sig.obese & NES.diab < 0 & NES.obese < 0 ~ "Amplified",
          sig.diab & sig.obese & NES.diab > 0 & NES.obese < 0 ~ "Reversed",
          sig.diab & sig.obese & NES.diab < 0 & NES.obese > 0 ~ "Reversed",
          sig.diab & !sig.obese  ~ "T1D-specific",
          !sig.diab & sig.obese  ~ "Adiposity-specific",
          TRUE ~ "NS"
        ),
        pathway = gsub("_", " ", gsub("HALLMARK_", "", pathway))
      )
    fg$quadrant <- factor(fg$quadrant,
                          c("Amplified", "Reversed", "Adiposity-specific", "T1D-specific", "NS"))

    # GSEA scatterplot
    ggplot(fg, aes(NES.diab, NES.obese, color = quadrant)) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 3) +
      ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
        data = filter(fg, sig.diab & sig.obese),
        aes(label = pathway), max.overlaps = Inf
      ) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("Amplified" = "#f08080",
                                    "Reversed" = "#90be6d",
                                    "Adiposity-specific" = "#669bbc",
                                    "T1D-specific" = "#ffcb77",
                                    "NS" = "#e5e5e5")) +
      labs(x = "NES\nT1D NW vs. HC",
           y = "NES\nT1D OB+OW vs. T1D NW",
           title = cell_safe,
           color = NULL) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
            panel.grid = element_blank(),
            plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")) +
      transparent_theme
    ggsave(file.path(fig_base, "scatter",
                     sprintf("%s_hallmark_t1d_obow.png", cell_safe)),
           bg = "transparent")

    # Save NEBULA combined CSV
    write.csv(ct_combined,
              file.path(csv_base, "nebula",
                        sprintf("%s_t1d_obow_nebula.csv", cell_safe)),
              row.names = FALSE)

    # ---- Focused: T1D-specific and Adiposity-specific volcano + GSEA ----
    specific.df <- ct_combined %>%
      filter(sig.joint_clean %nin% c("Reversed", "Amplified"))

    # T1D-specific volcano
    make_volcano(data = specific.df,
                 p_col = "pval.diab",
                 fc = "logFC.diab",
                 test_name = "T1D NW vs. HC",
                 cell_type = cell_safe,
                 positive_text = "Up in T1D",
                 negative_text = "Down in T1D")
    ggsave(file.path(fig_base, "specific",
                     sprintf("%s_t1d_specific_volcano.png", cell_safe)),
           bg = "transparent", width = 8, height = 7)

    # T1D-specific Hallmark
    fg %>%
      filter(quadrant == "T1D-specific") %>%
      arrange(desc(padj.diab)) %>%
      mutate(pathway = factor(pathway, levels = pathway)) %>%
      ggplot(aes(y = pathway, x = -log10(padj.diab), fill = NES.diab)) +
      geom_col(width = 0.9) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "#aaaaaa") +
      geom_text(aes(label = pathway),
                x = -log10(0.05) + 0.1, hjust = 0,
                fontface = "bold", color = "#2b2b2b") +
      scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#219ebc", mid = "white", high = "#d00000",
                           midpoint = 0,
                           guide = guide_colorbar(barheight = 0.4, barwidth = 8)) +
      expand_limits(x = 3) + 
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
            legend.position = "top",
            axis.text.y = element_blank(),
            legend.title = element_text(vjust = 0.8),
            plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 8, lineheight = 1.2),
            panel.background  = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
            plot.background   = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
            legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
            legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA)) +
      labs(y = NULL, x = "-log(adj.p-value)", fill = "NES", title = cell_safe)
    ggsave(file.path(fig_base, "specific",
                     sprintf("%s_t1d_specific_hallmark.png", cell_safe)),
           bg = "transparent")

    # Adiposity-specific volcano
    make_volcano(data = specific.df,
                 p_col = "pval.obese",
                 fc = "logFC.obese",
                 test_name = "T1D-OB vs T1D-NW",
                 cell_type = cell_safe,
                 positive_text = "Up in T1D-OB",
                 negative_text = "Down in T1D-OB")
    ggsave(file.path(fig_base, "specific",
                     sprintf("%s_obese_specific_volcano.png", cell_safe)),
           bg = "transparent", width = 8, height = 7)

    # Adiposity-specific Hallmark
    fg %>%
      filter(quadrant == "Adiposity-specific") %>%
      arrange(desc(padj.obese)) %>%
      mutate(pathway = factor(pathway, levels = pathway)) %>%
      ggplot(aes(y = pathway, x = -log10(padj.obese), fill = NES.obese)) +
      geom_col(width = 0.9) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "#aaaaaa") +
      geom_text(aes(label = pathway),
                x = -log10(0.05) + 0.1, hjust = 0,
                fontface = "bold", color = "#2b2b2b") +
      scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#219ebc", mid = "white", high = "#d00000",
                           midpoint = 0,
                           guide = guide_colorbar(barheight = 0.4, barwidth = 8)) +
      expand_limits(x = 3) + 
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
            legend.position = "top",
            axis.text.y = element_blank(),
            legend.title = element_text(vjust = 0.8),
            plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 8, lineheight = 1.2),
            panel.background  = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
            plot.background   = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
            legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
            legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA)) +
      labs(y = NULL, x = "-log(adj.p-value)", fill = "NES", title = cell_safe)
    ggsave(file.path(fig_base, "specific",
                     sprintf("%s_obese_specific_hallmark.png", cell_safe)),
           bg = "transparent")

    # Save GSEA CSV (collapse leading edges to comma-separated strings)
    fg$leA <- vapply(fg$leA, function(x) paste(unlist(x), collapse = ","), character(1))
    fg$leB <- vapply(fg$leB, function(x) paste(unlist(x), collapse = ","), character(1))
    write.csv(fg,
              file.path(csv_base, "gsea",
                        sprintf("%s_t1d_obow_hallmark.csv", cell_safe)),
              row.names = FALSE)
  }
}

# =============================================================================
# Run all three definitions
# =============================================================================
pathways <- gmtPathways(file.path(root_path, "GSEA/6_h.all.v2025.1.Hs.symbols.gmt"))

for (def in c("bmi", "dxa", "whtr")) {
  run_contrast_analysis(definition       = def,
                        kpmp_general     = kpmp_general,
                        root_path        = root_path,
                        pathways         = pathways,
                        transparent_theme = transparent_theme)
}
```
